brand_identity.name: TheDayLaborers
brand_identity.description: A high-performance workforce marketplace connecting contractors with immediate labor. Visuals are tactical, map-centric, and action-oriented.

primary.description: Deep Navy - Used for headers, primary backgrounds in dark mode, and strong brand presence.

secondary.description: Dark Blue - Used for active states, sidebar backgrounds, and secondary hierarchy.

accent.description: Bright Blue - THE ACTION COLOR. Used strictly for CTAs, Buttons, and Links. High contrast is key.

muted.description: Sky Blue - Used for background tints, information boxes, and subtle highlights.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar (Left) + Main Content (Right) or 3-Panel (Sidebar + Map + Action)

buttons.primary: bg-[#0000FF] hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold rounded-md shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-[#050A30] text-[#050A30] hover:bg-slate-50 font-bold rounded-md

cards.dashboard: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.marketing: bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

map_ui.container: h-[600px] w-full rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner border border-slate-200
map_ui.controls: absolute top-4 right-4 flex flex-col gap-2 z-[1000]
map_ui.marker: Custom SVG markers in brand colors (#0000FF for jobs, #050A30 for workers)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #0000FF text is NOT used on dark backgrounds without checking APCA. Use #7EC8E3 for text on dark backgrounds.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Do not use generic 'slate-500' text. Use 'text-[#050A30]/80' for softer text to maintain brand tint.
Map containers must always have a z-index strategy to prevent overlay issues.
Mobile-first: All grids start at grid-cols-1 and expand at md: or lg:.
Forms: Use shadcn/ui Form, Input, Select components. Do not use native HTML inputs.

steps: 1. Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette extension.
3. Create the layout wrapper with the Top Navbar (Contractor) or Bottom Tab Bar (Crew).
4. Build the Auth pages first (Login/Register) using the split layout (Image Left, Form Right).
6. Use the provided image URLs for the Landing Page hero and testimonials.
